name: tvtropes-explorer
title: TVTropes Explorer
description: Look up and browse TVTropes pages cleanly — no ads, no sidebar clutter, just the trope content
rationale: Graph signal: Graeme expressed interest in indexing TVTropes for cultural reasons across multiple episodes (9dac5cf8, 0e5258c3) and asked if BigClungus could operate a PostgreSQL DB to store TVTropes data. Graeme also noted that physical media helps avoid algoslop doomscrolling — a clean TVTropes reader removes exactly that. Jaboostin also plays EU-series games, which TVTropes extensively documents.
